title: Madhya Pradesh High Court judge cycles to Court after PM Modi's appeal to save fuel
description: Madhya Pradesh High Court judge Justice Dwarka Dhish Bansal was seen cycling to Court on Tuesday in response to Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s recent appeal to conserve fuel amid the ongoing global energy crisis due to the US-Iran war. Justice Bansal, who is posted at the Jabalpur Bench of the High Court, travelled nearly three kilometres from his official residence in the Civil Lines area to the court premises on a bicycle, accompanied by a court staff member.
